serves: links[] entries with kind: repository, provider: gitlab
_paik.notes: GITLAB_API_URL should point at your instance's API root (e.g. https://gitlab.example.com/api/v4) - set it to match the repository link's url field.
_paik.deprecation_notes: @modelcontextprotocol/server-gitlab ships from modelcontextprotocol/servers-archived - it no longer receives security updates. Evaluate a maintained alternative before using this in a real project.
